description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black backpack from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super cool! Height: 43 cm Width: 34 cm Depth at base: 13 cm Made of nylon for enhanced durability Roomy inner compartment with a large zippered pocket A second small zippered pocket to stow away prized possessions A cone shaped design on the front with brand name and logo and toggle straps and a spring clasp Brand tab appliqued on the side Haul loop for handling ease Two zippered pockets on the sides Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Cushioned panels on the back for added comfort Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
